title: GitHub Actions integration failures diagnosed: 126 lug status validation errors,
rationale: Identifies schema drift between implementation and validation in CI.
description: GitHub Actions integration failures diagnosed: 126 lug status validation errors, 3 wai.md missing sections, 4 inbox routing doc gaps. Root cause: test schema out of sync with current lug lifecycle.
decision_reason: Category: track-lug. Impact: 8/10. Defer until higher-priority signals processed.
